title: Fix sign out option and preserve complaints on account deletion

requirements.summary: Fix the sign out (logout) functionality in both AppHeader.tsx and AppSidebar.tsx so that clicking the logout/sign out option correctly terminates the user session, clears relevant app state, and redirects the user to the landing page without errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the sign out option in the header dropdown successfully logs the user out via Internet Identity.
Clicking the sign out option in the sidebar successfully logs the user out via Internet Identity.
After sign out, the user is redirected to the landing/login page.
No console errors occur during the sign out flow.
App state (profile, notifications, role) is cleared after sign out.

file_operations.description: Fix the logout handler in the user profile dropdown to properly call the clear() method from useInternetIdentity, clear the React Query cache via queryClient.clear(), and ensure error-free sign out flow. Ensure the logout option triggers authentication cleanup and redirects to the landing page.

Fix the logout handler in the sidebar to properly call the clear() method from useInternetIdentity, clear the React Query cache via queryClient.clear(), and ensure error-free sign out flow. Ensure the logout option triggers authentication cleanup and redirects to the landing page.

requirements.summary: Update DeleteAccountDialog.tsx so that after account deletion, it only clears the user's own profile-related localStorage keys and does NOT delete complaint metadata stored in localComplaintStore for complaints submitted by that user.
acceptanceCriteria: After account deletion, complaint metadata in localStorage (categories, departments, media references, feedback) is preserved.
Only user profile-specific localStorage keys are cleared on account deletion.
Emergency alert and notification localStorage entries unrelated to the deleted user are not affected.

file_operations.description: Update the account deletion flow to preserve complaint metadata in localStorage. Remove any logic that clears complaint-related localStorage keys (categories, departments, media, feedback). Only clear user profile-specific keys and authentication state. Ensure emergency alerts and notifications unrelated to the user remain intact.
